notes: Store uses Map<id, Entity> for each type. Seed creates Alice, Bob, workspace, boards, columns, cards, comments, notifications as per architecture.
title: Set up project foundation: config, types, and store
description: Create package.json with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind dependencies. Configure tsconfig.json and tailwind.config.ts. Define core TypeScript interfaces (User, Workspace, Board, Column, Card, Comment, Invite, Notification, WorkspaceMember). Implement in-memory store with Maps for each entity, export typed access functions, and create seed.ts with demo data.

notes: Auth uses HttpOnly cookies with randomUUID tokens. Passwords stored plaintext with TODO comment. Rank algorithm handles insert-between cases like 'a', 'b' → 'am'.
title: Implement core utilities: auth, rank, and notifications
description: Create auth.ts with cookie-based session management using Map<token, userId>. Implement rank.ts with fractional string ranking (simple midpoint algorithm). Create notifications.ts with sendEmail() stub that logs to console. All utilities use built-in Node modules only (crypto.randomUUID, etc.).

notes: Login must set HttpOnly cookie 'session_token'. Register automatically sets emailVerifiedAt (bypass for demo). All endpoints validate session via auth.getUserFromRequest.
title: Build authentication API routes (register, login, logout, me)
description: Implement POST /api/auth/register (creates user with emailVerifiedAt auto-set), POST /api/auth/login (validates credentials, sets session cookie), POST /api/auth/logout (clears cookie), GET /api/auth/me (returns current user). All routes use auth.ts utilities and store.ts data.

notes: Accept-invite page must handle two flows: new user (show registration form) and existing user (redirect to login). Token validation via POST /api/invites/accept.
title: Create auth pages: login, register, and accept-invite
description: Build login page with email/password form that calls /api/auth/login. Build register page with email, password, displayName. Build accept-invite page that takes token param, validates via API, handles new user registration or existing user login flow.

notes: Workspace creation requires unique slug validation. All endpoints check workspace membership via assertMember helper. Dashboard page uses /api/auth/me to get user data.
title: Implement workspace API routes and dashboard page
description: Create POST /api/workspaces (create workspace), GET /api/workspaces/[workspaceId] (get workspace with members), GET /api/workspaces/[workspaceId]/boards (list boards). Build dashboard page showing user's workspaces with navigation to workspace pages.

notes: Invite tokens are UUIDs stored plaintext (demo). Accept endpoint returns 410 for expired invites. Settings page shows member list and invite form with email validation.
title: Build workspace invite system (API + settings page)
description: Implement POST /api/workspaces/[workspaceId]/invites (create invite, log email), DELETE /api/workspaces/[workspaceId]/invites/[inviteId] (revoke), POST /api/invites/accept (validate token, add member). Create workspace settings page showing members, pending invites, invite form.

notes: Board creation auto-creates 3 system columns (To Do, In Progress, Done) with ranks 1,2,3. GET /boards returns nested structure for frontend efficiency.
title: Implement board and column APIs
description: Create POST /api/workspaces/[workspaceId]/boards (creates board with 3 fixed columns), GET /api/boards/[boardId] (returns board with columns and cards), PATCH /api/boards/[boardId] (rename/archive). Build workspace page showing board list.

notes: Drag-and-drop uses native API, no external libraries. CardTile shows overdue indicator if dueDate < today. Assignee shown as avatar initial. Implement optimistic updates on drag.
title: Build core Kanban UI components (Board, Column, CardTile)
description: Create KanbanBoard component with horizontal column layout. Build KanbanColumn component rendering CardTile list. Implement CardTile showing title, assignee avatar initial, due date, overdue indicator. Add HTML5 drag-and-drop with onDragStart/onDragOver/onDrop handlers.

notes: Card PATCH handles column moves (columnId) and reordering (rank). Comment edit/delete restricted to author. Card assignee is nullable foreign key to User.
title: Implement card and comment APIs
description: Create POST /api/columns/[columnId]/cards (create card), GET/PATCH /api/cards/[cardId] (get/update card), DELETE /api/cards/[cardId] (archive). Build GET/POST /api/cards/[cardId]/comments and PATCH/DELETE /api/comments/[commentId] for comment CRUD.

notes: Assignee selector filters workspace members. Due date uses HTML date input. Comment edit shows inline textarea. Modal uses Portal for overlay. Comment pagination uses query param ?page.
title: Build card modal and comment section components
description: Create CardModal component showing card details (title, description, assignee selector, due date picker). Implement CommentSection with paginated comments (20 per page), comment form, edit/delete controls. Add assignee dropdown populated from workspace members.

notes: Page is client component for drag-and-drop. useBoard handles optimistic updates and polling reconciliation. Card moves call PATCH with columnId and rank. Show 'Live updates paused' banner on error.
title: Create board page with real-time polling integration
description: Build board page ([boardId]) that renders KanbanBoard. Implement useBoard hook polling GET /api/boards/[boardId] every 3 seconds. Add card creation via column footer. Handle drag-and-drop with PATCH /cards/:id calls.

notes: Notifications generated on card assignment, comment mentions, invites. NotificationBell polls every 10 seconds. InviteModal used in workspace settings.
title: Implement notifications API and UI components
description: Create GET /api/notifications (list unread), PATCH /api/notifications/[id]/read (mark read), PATCH /api/notifications/read-all. Build NotificationBell component with dropdown showing notifications. Create InviteModal for sending invites.

notes: Navbar shows user displayName and avatar initial. Workspace switcher uses /api/workspaces. Layout applies global Tailwind classes.
title: Build shared UI components and layout
description: Create Navbar with user avatar, workspace switcher, notification bell. Implement layout.tsx with navbar, Tailwind base styles. Build home page (/) with project description and auth CTAs.

notes: useNotifications manages unread count state. Card assignee changes should trigger notification via PATCH /cards. Overdue indicator compares dueDate with current date.
title: Implement useNotifications hook and final integration
description: Create useNotifications hook polling /api/notifications. Integrate NotificationBell into Navbar. Connect CardModal assignee changes to notification creation. Add overdue indicator logic to CardTile.

notes: Test drag failure by simulating API error. Verify invite flow works by copying console.log invite URL. Check real-time polling updates between two browser sessions.
title: Final polish, error handling, and seed verification
description: Add error toasts for failed operations. Implement card snap-back on drag failure. Verify seed data creates correct demo state. Add loading states to all async operations. Test full user flow from registration to board interaction.
